reason: Adjusting the dcredit setting in /etc/security/pwquality.conf only affects password complexity requirements. Requiring at least one digit is a common STIG hardening measure and does not modify system boot, partitioning, or critical services. The change is applied at authentication time and does not require a reboot.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Users may need to update passwords to meet new digit requirement; Potential for temporary login failures until passwords are compliant
